svg.text: ① INGESTION PIPELINE (happens once at upload)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the PDF upload step in a RAG system')
sendPrompt('How does text extraction from PDF work in RAG?')
sendPrompt('Explain text chunking strategies in RAG — what chunk size and overlap should I use?')
sendPrompt('What are embeddings and how do they work in RAG?')
sendPrompt('What is a vector database and how does FAISS or Chroma work?')

svg.text: ② QUERY PIPELINE (happens on every user message)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should the React chat frontend include for a RAG system?')
sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI backend do in a RAG system?')
sendPrompt('Why do we embed the user query in RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does cosine similarity vector search work?')
sendPrompt('What happens to retrieved chunks in RAG — how are they used as context?')
sendPrompt('What goes inside the RAG prompt template — show me an example')
sendPrompt('Which LLM should I use in my RAG project — Claude, GPT-4, or Llama?')
sendPrompt('How do I show sources in a RAG response?')
sendPrompt('How do I evaluate a RAG system — what is faithfulness and context relevance?')
sendPrompt('What is LangChain and why use it for RAG?')
sendPrompt('Difference between FAISS, Chroma, and Pinecone for RAG')
sendPrompt('Why FastAPI for a RAG backend?')
sendPrompt('What React libraries should I use for the chat UI?')
sendPrompt('What is RAGAS and how do I use it to evaluate my RAG pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What Python PDF parsing library should I use — PyPDF2 vs pdfplumber?')
sendPrompt('What is the OpenAI text-embedding-3-small model used for?')
sendPrompt('What is Python used for in a RAG project?')

svg.text: Click any box to ask a follow-up question
